prompt: Fix the typo in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md where ' Layer 3' should be 'Layer 3' (extra space before 'Layer 3' on line 15). Just fix the typo, nothing else.

assertions.name: classifies_as_simple
assertions.description: Correctly identifies task as Simple complexity

assertions.name: no_execution_plan
assertions.description: Does NOT create an execution plan file (not needed for simple tasks)

assertions.name: direct_execution
assertions.description: Executes directly without delegating to sub-agent

assertions.name: lightweight_validation
assertions.description: Runs only build → test (not full pipeline)
